title: Add Manager bio section with Allen A. information

requirements.summary: Create a 'Meet the Manager' section on the homepage featuring Allen A. with photo and biography
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Meet the Manager' section appears on the homepage
The section displays the uploaded photo 90s.jpg of Allen A.
The section includes the title 'Manager' and name 'Allen A.'
The complete biography text provided by the user is displayed
The section is styled consistently with the rest of the homepage design
The section emphasizes the gym's reputation, equipment quality, and community focus

file_operations.description: Add a 'Meet the Manager' section between the hero section and testimonials section featuring Allen A. as Manager of Bodyshape Fitness. Display the manager photo from frontend/public/assets/generated/90s.dim_400x400.jpg alongside the biography text emphasizing his experience in the fitness industry, the gym's reputation as the number one gym in Independence, KY, state-of-the-art equipment, top-tier facilities, commitment to member wellness and success, and the supportive community. Use consistent styling with existing homepage sections including the red accent color scheme and responsive layout.

requirements.summary: Add the uploaded manager photo as a static asset and reference it in the Meet the Manager section
acceptanceCriteria: The 90s.jpg image is stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The Meet the Manager section correctly references and displays the image
The image is responsive and displays properly on mobile and desktop devices

file_operations.description: Add the uploaded manager photo 90s.jpg as a static asset with dimensions 400x400 pixels for use in the Meet the Manager section. This image will be referenced in the homepage component to display Allen A.'s professional photo.
